response.overview: It's 1990 in Santiago de los Caballeros. Eva, a domestic worker, runs away with her daughter Kirsis to escape the clutches of her boss Abraham, a cruel and sexist man. Their escape changes the course of their lives forever. Marked by childhood traumas, Kirsis grows up normalizing the abnormal in her environment. As an adult, she becomes an undercover police officer and is assigned to catch the leader of a criminal organization dedicated to drug trafficking. In the process, she discovers a shocking truth that connects with her past and redefines her life.
response.title: Lechones
